result.summary: The page is mostly functional but has a notable spelling error in primary navigation, plus several truncation/cropping issues on the right edge of the viewport that may indicate layout problems rather than intentional carousel overflow.

issues.description: The navigation tab labeled 'Jacpots' is misspelled — it should be 'Jackpots'. This is a prominent typo in the main category navigation.
The 'Hot Gam...' navigation tab is cut off at the right edge of the screen with no visible scroll affordance (e.g., fade gradient or arrow) indicating more tabs exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a horizontal scroll indicator such as a gradient fade or chevron so users know the nav row is scrollable.

issues.description: Game thumbnails in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are abruptly clipped at the right viewport edge (e.g., 'MAGNI... PHO...', 'MUN... MI...'), which looks visually broken rather than like an intentional carousel peek.
issues.suggestion: If these rows are carousels, adjust card widths/spacing so partial cards are clearly a peek (e.g., show ~30-50% of the next card consistently) or add fade/arrow affordances; otherwise fix the container overflow.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles (e.g., 'Who Wants to Be a Millionaire', 'DARK WATER') is vertically cut off by the fixed bottom navigation bar, hiding parts of the game artwork and info icons.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable content equal to the bottom nav height so tiles aren't obscured; if this is mid-scroll it may be acceptable, but verify content isn't permanently hidden.

issues.description: The hero banner's left navigation arrow has very low contrast against the yellow background, making it hard to see, while the right arrow is more visible.
issues.suggestion: Increase the contrast of carousel arrows (e.g., darker color or semi-opaque backdrop) so both are clearly visible against the banner artwork.
